---
title: "PLAD Model"
author: "Noble Hendricks"
output:
  html_document: default
  theme: flatly
vignette: "%\\VignetteIndexEntry{Survival Model} %\\VignetteEngine{knitr::rmarkdown}
  %\\VignetteEncoding{UTF-8}\n"
#output: word_document
---

```{r, include = FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  collapse = TRUE,
  comment = "#>",
  fig.width = 7,
  fig.height = 5
)
```

```{r setup, include = FALSE}
library(ggplot2)
library(tidyverse)
library(bayesplot)
library(wesanderson)
library(SRJPEdata)
library(SRJPEmodel)
```

## Overview

## Submodel Objective

## Conceptual model

# Model Input

# Running survival submodel

# Model Output

**Table**

**Plots**

**Resources**
